timeline.title: AI Engineer
description: Built and shipped production AI skills marketplace and multi-step agents system integrated with Claude Code and Cursor, automating marketing, analytics, and operational workflows across a 50+ skill ecosystem serving 130M+ members

Engineered BigQuery-backed AI skills for campaign performance, audience segmentation, and member data analysis, replacing hours of manual SQL work with reliable LLM-driven automation used daily by 50+ team members
Integrated MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and tool-use architectures into multi-step agents, enabling structured automation of cross-functional marketing workflows
Improved skill platform reliability by QA-ing existing skills, fixing edge cases in prompts and data pipelines, and contributing to the skill builder, evaluation pipeline, and governance framework

timeline.title: Software Development Intern
description: Deployed Ollama-backed local LLM inference pipeline with semantic retrieval and conversation history into an AI-powered issue tracking system used by 250+ engineers, eliminating external API dependency

Architected full-stack agentic issue tracker using microservices, REST APIs, and an MCP server enabling natural language queries against Git repositories - replacing Jira and reducing operational tooling cost
Engineered AI-assisted Jenkins CI/CD pipeline for ArcGIS environment setup, reducing provisioning time by ~80% and enabling reproducible deployments via YAML-based configurations

timeline.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Integrated SOC2-compliant IBM Secret Manager with IaaS using encryption in transit and at rest, eliminating HSM dependency, saving $3M, and enabling seamless client portability across infrastructure nodes
Designed and owned IAM access control system using OpenID Connect for 600+ users with p95 latency under 150ms, eliminating manual LDAP workflows and saving 20+ engineering hours weekly
Built distributed data pipelines with Kafka and Debezium CDC across 60+ global data centers, profiling bottlenecks via Prometheus, Grafana, and New Relic to optimize throughput
Automated infrastructure provisioning using Ansible and Helm, reducing configuration drift by ~60% and improving system-wide reliability and observability

timeline.title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Architected low-latency distributed sports aggregator in Java Spring Boot and Go, processing ~14M weekly requests with layered services reducing response time by 30%
Raised unit and integration test coverage from ~40% to 85%, cutting manual QA cycles by ~20 hours weekly and accelerating release velocity
